name: Baotek Industrial Materials Ltd.
summary: Baotek Industrial Materials Ltd. manufactures and sells fiberglass fabrics in primarily Taiwan, China, and internationally. It offers aerospace fiberglass fabric, a reinforcement material for airplanes' internal structure; high temperature filter bag used in power and steel plants, incinerators, and cement factories; fiberglass sun shade that are use in buildings, interior designs, construction, and furniture; PTFE fabrics for use in PTFE coating areas; and electronic fiberglass fabrics. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
